message:
test(core): add 9 proptest properties for runtime_compat join/select/spawn_blocking/yield

Cover the newly added runtime_compat primitives with property-based tests:
- join! macro: value preservation (2-ary, 3-ary), channel roundtrip
- select! macro: immediate branch, channel vs sleep, biased ordering
- task::spawn_blocking: value preservation, computation correctness
- task::yield_now: counter preservation through interleaved yields

Total: 56 proptest properties in proptest_runtime_compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
